publicPhraseOverrides.monarchical restoration as a serious def: bringing back monarchy as the obvious answer
publicPhraseOverrides.europe-linked sovereignty debates: arguments over how much power should stay in France
publicPhraseOverrides.media-saturated legitimacy crisis: a trust crisis amplified by nonstop media

inequality.label: Inequality
inequality.description: How unevenly power, wealth, and advantage are shared.

eliteCompetition.label: Power struggle
eliteCompetition.description: How much the people at the top are fighting each other.

institutionalLegitimacy.label: Public trust
institutionalLegitimacy.description: How much people trust the system, its rules, and the people running it.

socialCohesion.label: Social bonds
socialCohesion.description: How strongly people feel they belong together and can pull in the same direction.

technologicalDisruption.label: Tech disruption
technologicalDisruption.description: How quickly new technology upends work, war, daily life, and institutions.

informationAcceleration.label: Information rush
informationAcceleration.description: How fast news, rumours, messages, and arguments spread.

ecologicalStrain.label: Environmental strain
ecologicalStrain.description: Pressure from disease, harvest failure, climate, resource use, or environmental damage.

militarization.label: Militarisation
militarization.description: How strongly war and military thinking shape society and the state.

moralCertainty.label: Moral certainty
moralCertainty.description: How strongly a society treats its beliefs or ideology as beyond question.

publicHope.label: Shared hope
publicHope.description: How strongly people feel the future can be made better.

individualAutonomy.label: Personal freedom
individualAutonomy.description: How much room people have to shape their own lives instead of staying in inherited roles.

economicPrecarity.label: Economic insecurity
economicPrecarity.description: How exposed people are to insecurity in work, prices, and everyday survival.

high-hope settlement.label: Confidence holds things together
high-hope settlement.prompt: This is one of the moments when shared confidence helps hold things together.

mobilised settlement.label: Order rebuilt under pressure
mobilised settlement.prompt: This is one of the moments when a shaken system is pulled back together under pressure.

fragmenting acceleration.label: Fast change, fraying trust
fragmenting acceleration.prompt: This is one of the moments when fast change starts pulling trust and everyday life apart.

militarised conviction.label: Power hardens around belief
militarised conviction.prompt: This is one of the moments when power hardens around belief and conflict.

accelerated transition.label: Fast transition
accelerated transition.prompt: This is one of the moments when change speeds up and older habits struggle to keep up.

brittle order.label: Order starting to crack
brittle order.prompt: This is one of the moments when order still stands, but the cracks are getting harder to miss.

reconstruction settlement.label: Order rebuilt after crisis
reconstruction settlement.prompt: This is one of the moments when people try to rebuild order after a major break.

high-strain-high-order.label: Heavy strain, but the centre still holds

cluster-edge.label: This era sits at the edge of the usual pattern
